title: Azure Key Vault sync fails with error 400
symptom: Both Prod and Dev servers receive an error 400 when attempting to sync with Azure Key Vault. This prevents any secrets from being synced.
not_this_if: Secrets are successfully syncing without errors
root_cause: The error occurs because one of the secrets in Azure Key Vault was disabled. This prevents n8n from syncing any secrets, leading to a complete failure in the sync process.
fix_steps: Identify the disabled secret in Azure Key Vault
Retry the sync operation in n8n
agent_instruction: Enable the disabled secret in Azure Key Vault and retry the sync operation.
